alkylation reagent: the reduced cysteines were alkylated with 40 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: Proteins were digested with sequencing grade Trypsin
collision energy: fragmented with HCD MS/MS using a normalized collision energy of 30
enrichment method: immunoprecipitated proteins using the anti-nitrotyrosine antibody
instrument: coupled to Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
labeling: Protein quantification was performed using the label-free quantification algorithm
reduction reagent: treated with 10 mM DTT in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
